name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.7.1: update_all_fields no longer strips watermarks (closes #42) — ooxml-swift v0.13.4 honest dirty-bit propagation; headers/footers without SEQ stay byte-preserved. v3.7.0: autosave Design B + insert crash hardening (#40 #41). v3.6.0: autosave/checkpoint/recover (#37). v3.5.5: keep_bak (#38). v3.5.4: actor (#39). v3.5.3: atomic-rename save (#36).
